holdings.infoBox: BLCK is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are Coinbase Global stock at 6.49%, Hut 8 at 5.66%, IREN Limited at 5.46%, Cipher Digital at 5.29%, and Riot Platforms at 5.16%.

overview.description: The Corgi Crypto Infrastructure ETF (BLCK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is actively managed and invests in companies supporting digital asset and blockchain ecosystems, including exchanges, custody providers, mining infrastructure, trading platforms, and blockchain-related software and services. The fund seeks capital growth. BLCK was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.

data.title: Corgi Funds Launches Record 34 ETFs
data.text: The U.S. ETF industry saw its single-largest new ETF rollout in history when issuer Corgi Funds launched 34 actively managed funds on the Cboe BZX exchange. The new products are a mix of thematic and ...
